seo.defaultTitle: Ergo Platformu - Sözleşmeli para için dayanıklı blockchain
seo.defaultDescription: Ergo, on yıllık blockchain teorisi ve geliştirmesinin attığı sağlam temeller üzerine gelişmiş kriptografik özellikler ve radikal yeni DeFi işlevselliği inşa eder.
seo.keywords: blockchain, kripto para, DeFi, akıllı sözleşmeler, Ergo, UTXO, iş kanıtı

utxo.title: [TODO: UTXO Model (Bitcoin-style)]
utxo.description: [TODO: No global balances — only a collection of unspent outputs.]
utxo.analogy: [TODO: Analogy: Like having cash bills/coins. Each transaction spends some bills, creates new ones.]
utxo.strengthsText: [TODO: Simplicity, privacy, parallel processing, easier audit trails.]
utxo.weaknessText: [TODO: Not naturally suited for stateful dApps.]

account.title: [TODO: Account Model (Ethereum-style)]
account.description: [TODO: Global state: Each account has a balance and (for contracts) its own data storage.]
account.analogy: [TODO: Analogy: Like a bank account — all assets tracked in one place.]
account.strengthsText: [TODO: Intuitive, flexible for stateful apps, natural for Turing-complete contracts.]
account.weaknessesText: [TODO: Potential for re-entrancy bugs, unpredictable gas, global state bloat.]

conclusion.text: [TODO: The eUTXO model is a quantum leap: it keeps UTXO's clarity, security, and scalability while unlocking true programmability. For developers who want robust, auditable, and future-proof dApps — Ergo's approach is both powerful and elegant.]

updateTriggers.content: [TODO: New data is published when price deviation exceeds threshold (e.g., 0.5%), maximum time since last update (e.g., 1 hour), or minimum oracle submissions are reached.]

economicSecurity.title: [TODO: Economic Security]
economicSecurity.content: [TODO: Oracle operators must stake collateral, with slashing for malicious behavior and rewards for honest participation, creating strong economic incentives for reliable data.]

whatIsErgo.q: [TODO: What is Ergo in simple terms?]
whatIsErgo.a: [TODO: Ergo is a secure Proof-of-Work blockchain for powerful smart contracts, enabling decentralized financial applications. Think of it as digital money (ERG) with programmable rules.]

isErgoCompany.a: [TODO: No, Ergo is a decentralized, open-source protocol. The Ergo Foundation is a non-profit community body that supports development but does not control the network.]

fairLaunch.a: [TODO: Ergo had no Initial Coin Offering (ICO) or pre-mined tokens for founders. This ensures a more equitable distribution, as everyone had an equal opportunity to acquire ERG through mining from day one.]

ergoDifference.q: [TODO: How is Ergo different from Bitcoin or Ethereum?]
ergoDifference.a: [TODO: vs. Bitcoin: Ergo supports advanced smart contracts, not just currency. \n vs. Ethereum: Ergo uses the eUTXO model for enhanced security and predictable fees, and remains Proof-of-Work.]

whatIsEutxo.a: [TODO: The Extended UTXO model attaches data and logic directly to "boxes" of money. This enhances smart contract security, fee predictability, and allows for better scalability compared to the account model.]

whatIsErgoscript.a: [TODO: ErgoScript is the powerful and secure programming language for writing smart contracts on Ergo. You do not need to know code to use Ergo; it's a tool for developers.]

sigmaProtocols.a: [TODO: These are advanced zero-knowledge proofs built into Ergo's core, enabling privacy features like ErgoMixer, complex multi-party contracts, and secure multi-signature schemes.]

ergCoinUse.q: [TODO: What is the ERG coin used for?]
ergCoinUse.a: [TODO: ERG is used for transaction fees, collateral for stablecoins (SigmaUSD), participating in DeFi applications, powering dApps (NFTs, gaming), and incentivizing miners.]

howToGetErg.a: [TODO: You can acquire ERG on various cryptocurrency exchanges, through peer-to-peer trades, or by mining. Always do your own research before investing.]

bestWallet.q: [TODO: Which wallet is best for beginners?]
bestWallet.a: [TODO: The official mobile wallets (Android/iOS) or the Nautilus Wallet (browser extension) are excellent, user-friendly starting points.]

dappsOnErgo.q: [TODO: What kinds of dApps are on Ergo?]
dappsOnErgo.a: [TODO: Ergo's ecosystem includes DeFi platforms (Spectrum, Duckpools), privacy tools (ErgoMixer), NFT marketplaces (SkyHarbor), cross-chain bridges (Rosen), and more.]

ergoMixer.a: [TODO: ErgoMixer is a non-custodial service that increases your transaction privacy by mixing your ERG with others, making it difficult to trace your transaction history.]

whoGoverns.a: [TODO: Ergo is decentralized and community-driven. Protocol changes are discussed and formalized through Ergo Improvement Proposals (EIPs), with miners signaling support.]

howToContribute.q: [TODO: How can I contribute if I'm not a developer?]
howToContribute.a: [TODO: You can help with community support, content creation (articles, videos), translation, testing dApps, or simply spreading awareness about Ergo.]

sustainable.title: SÜRDÜRÜLEBİLİR
sustainable.subtitle: Kalıcı Olmak İçin İnşa Edildi
sustainable.description: Depolama kiralama mekanizması blok zinciri şişmesini önler ve onlarca yıl boyunca öngörülebilir maliyetlerle ağ sağlığını garanti eder.

fairAndSecure.title: ADİL VE GÜVENLİ
fairAndSecure.subtitle: İş İspatı Temeli
fairAndSecure.description: ICO yok, ön madencilik yok. ASIC dirençli madencilik, herkes için gerçek merkeziyetsizlik ve uzun vadeli güvenlik sağlar.

powerfulAndFlexible.title: GÜÇLÜ VE ESNEK
powerfulAndFlexible.subtitle: Gelişmiş Akıllı Sözleşmeler
powerfulAndFlexible.description: eUTXO modeli + ErgoScript, mümkün olanın sınırlarını zorlayan güvenli, ifade gücü yüksek DeFi uygulamalarını mümkün kılar.

privacy.title: GİZLİLİK ÖNCELİKLİ
privacy.description: Gizli işlemler için Sigma protokolleri ile isteğe bağlı gizlilik.

community.title: TOPLULUK ODAKLI
community.description: Dünya çapındaki tutkulu katkıda bulunanlar tarafından yönetilen açık kaynak geliştirme.

developer.title: GELİŞTİRİCİ DOSTU
developer.description: Dünya standartlarında belgeler, araçlar ve destek, Ergo üzerinde inşa etmeyi kolaylaştırır.

blogSection.title: LATEST FROM THE ERGO BLOG
blogSection.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest news, technical insights, and community updates from the Ergo ecosystem

subscribeSection.subtitle: Get Ergo releases, grants, dev calls, and top articles delivered weekly
subscribeSection.privacyNotice: We respect your privacy. Your email is only used for Ergo updates and will never be shared with third parties. You can unsubscribe at any time with one click.

rosenBridge.title: Rosen Bridge
rosenBridge.subtitle: Ergo Ekosistemini Bağlamak
rosenBridge.description: Rosen Bridge ile Ergo ve Bitcoin, Ethereum, Cardano ve BSC gibi diğer önde gelen blok zincirler arasında varlıkları sorunsuz bir şekilde transfer edin. Güvenli Watcher & Guard sistemimiz çapraz zincir likiditeyi ve yeni DeFi olanaklarını açar.

crossChain.label: Çapraz Zincir
crossChain.value: BTC, ETH, ADA, BSC ve daha fazlası

ergoMixer.title: ErgoMixer
ergoMixer.subtitle: Saklama Yapmayan Gizlilik Protokolü
ergoMixer.description: ErgoMixer, Sigma protokolleri ve halka imzaları kullanarak son teknoloji gizlilik çözümleri sağlar. İsteğe bağlı şeffaflık özellikleri aracılığıyla düzenleyici uyumluluğu korurken tam finansal gizlilikten yararlanın.

sigmaUSD.title: SigmaUSD
sigmaUSD.subtitle: Algoritmik Stablecoin Protokolü
sigmaUSD.description: SigmaUSD, Ergo üzerine inşa edilmiş kripto destekli algoritmik bir stablecoin protokolüdür. Geleneksel bankacılık sistemlerine veya merkezi rezervlere bağımlı olmadan istikrarlı değer yaratmanın merkezi olmayan bir yolunu sağlar.

gaming.title: Ergo Oyun Ekosistemi
gaming.subtitle: Blok Zincir Oyun Platformu
gaming.description: Gerçek varlık sahipliği, oyna-kazan mekaniği ve merkezi olmayan turnuvalarla oyunun geleceğini deneyimleyin. Ergo'nun verimli ve güvenli blok zincir altyapısı tarafından desteklenmektedir.
